title: OAuth Open Platform - Full Implementation Plan

tasks.title: Expand scope definitions in shared types
tasks.description: Add all 14 scopes to ShadowOAuthScope type and VALID_SCOPES constant: user:read, user:email, servers:read, servers:write, channels:read, channels:write, messages:read, messages:write, attachments:read, attachments:write, workspaces:read, workspaces:write, buddies:create, buddies:manage

tasks.title: Add OAuth token auth middleware
tasks.description: Create oauthAuthMiddleware that validates opaque access tokens (oat_) and sets oauthToken context. Create oauthScopeMiddleware factory function for scope enforcement.

tasks.title: Extend DB schema for Buddy support
tasks.description: Add oauthAppId and parentUserId to users table. Add oauthAppId and buddyUserId to agents table.

tasks.title: Widen scope column in DB schema
tasks.description: Increase scope varchar length from 255 to 1024 to accommodate multiple new scopes in oauth_authorization_codes, oauth_access_tokens, oauth_consents tables.

tasks.title: Implement OAuth servers API
tasks.description: GET /api/oauth/servers (servers:read) - list user's servers. POST /api/oauth/servers (servers:write) - create server. POST /api/oauth/servers/:id/invite (servers:write) - invite user.

tasks.title: Implement OAuth buddies API
tasks.description: POST /api/oauth/buddies (buddies:create) - create Buddy bot. POST /api/oauth/buddies/:id/messages (buddies:manage) - Buddy sends message.

tasks.title: Update @shadowob/oauth SDK types and methods
tasks.description: Expand ShadowOAuthScope type with all 14 scopes. Add methods: getServers, createServer, inviteToServer, getChannels, createChannel, getMessages, sendMessage, uploadAttachment, getWorkspace, createBuddy, sendBuddyMessage.

tasks.title: Create OAuth Apps management settings page
tasks.description: Add 'Developer' tab in Settings page with OAuth App CRUD: list apps, create new app (showing clientSecret once), edit, delete, reset secret. Show authorization stats.

tasks.title: Update OAuth authorize page for new scopes
tasks.description: Add scope group display and descriptions for all 14 scopes on the authorization consent page.

tasks.title: Expand E2E tests for all OAuth API endpoints
tasks.description: Add E2E tests for: scope validation, servers CRUD, channels CRUD, messages read/write, attachments, workspaces, buddy creation and messaging, scope enforcement (insufficient_scope errors).

tasks.title: Run full test suite and fix issues
tasks.description: Run vitest for server tests, fix any type errors, lint issues.

tasks.title: Run typecheck and lint
tasks.description: Ensure biome lint passes and tsc --noEmit passes for all affected packages.

tasks.title: Create feature branch and submit PR
tasks.description: Create branch feat/oauth-open-platform, commit all changes, push, create PR ensuring pr-checks pass.
